title: HiFiCorp is back in George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - George residents, you asked,...
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - George residents, you asked, and HiFiCorp has answered.

This much-loved brand is back in the Garden Route! Currently the only branch in the region, the store officially opened at the Eden Meander Lifestyle Centre on 1 November.


> With an ethos focused squarely on customer service and product availability, HiFiCorp brings a refreshing approach to the way we shop.


Whether you're after the latest laptop, a big-screen TV, a powerful sound system or smart home gadgets, they've got you covered. From must-have home appliances and kitchen essentials to the latest in tech and entertainment, this is your ultimate destination for unbeatable deals, epic tech, and all the gear you need to get festive-ready.

There's never been a better time to shop smart and save big, all under one roof!

Plus, their flexible payment options make shopping a breeze. Choose from lay-by with up to six months to pay, opening a store account with flexible terms or benefitting from credit terms of up to 36 months to pay.

You can even opt for convenient tech-on-contract deals. And for extra peace of mind, extended warranties of 24 or 36 months are available - starting only once the manufacturer's warranty ends.

"We are finally back in George! Come and find us at Eden Meander," says branch manager Wynand Nel.

Let the team help you find your next big purchase, backed by service that's truly local.

Contact HiFiCorp on 021 133 0028.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
